creator: mike@FreeBSD.org
text:

Subject: Re: bin/19405: telnetd sends DO AUTHENTICATION even if authentication is disabled

X-Mailer: Gnus v5.7/Emacs 20.7

> Synopsis: telnetd sends DO AUTHENTICATION even if authentication is disabled
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: mike
> State-Changed-When: Sat Jul 21 21:12:16 PDT 2001
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Does this problem still occur in newer versions of FreeBSD,
> such as 4.3-RELEASE?

Yes, it does on my 4.3-STABLE box.

joelh
